title: Concorda logigraph rule node
description: One node = one business rule. References ontology entities; claims depgraph code nodes that implement the rule. The plain-language statement and Decision table in the dossier are the canonical statement of meaning; the technical anchor is one implementation of it.

title.description: Short human-readable label. E.g. "Peer crew identity hidden unless resume is published".

statement.description: Single-sentence plain-English rule. The full structured form (Decision table, examples, edge cases) lives in the dossier.

references_ontology.description: Ontology node ids the rule mentions. Validated against nodes/ontology/ at regen time; missing ids are orphans.

claims_code.description: Depgraph code nodes that implement this rule. At least one required — a rule with zero claims is unenforced.

fan_out.description: Computed at regen time: count of claims_code entries. Reported by bin/logigraph fan-out for refactor signals.

confidence.description: How confident the author is in the rule's accuracy. Low = forward-looking or speculative.

source.description: Where the rule was sourced from (memory file, design doc, code docstring).

structural_hash.description: SHA-256 over statement + references_ontology + claim ids. Drift triggers dossier re-review.

dossier.description: Path to the plain-language dossier markdown (relative to logigraph/).

depgraph_id.description: Id of a node in the depgraph corpus. Validated at regen — missing ids are orphans.

role.description: How this code implements the rule. enforces=gate/filter, checks=predicate, serializes=response shape, displays=UI surface, emits=side-effect.

where.description: File:line range where the rule lives in this node's source. E.g. "events.py:2235-2406".

remote_hash.description: Copy of the depgraph node's structural_hash at last review. Drift between this and current hash flags the claim as stale.

stale.description: Set by reconcile when remote_hash diverges from depgraph node. Surfaced by hooks; cleared by re-reviewing the claim.
